name: Chip Chase // Transformers g1
description:
Literally just sitting there, typing on his computer at home.

The song playing on his radio in initial message was changed! Instead of Everybody Wants to Rule the World it’s now When Doves Cry to make it more time accurate!

Made this mainly for myself because I love him so much omg

Uhh I indeed take requests comment them or something
